title: neuontobotrys lanatus
intro: Neuontobotrys lanatus, also known as Stinking Passion Fruit or Wild Passion Fruit, is a type of flowering vine native to South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Neuontobotrys lanatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. Neuontobotrys lanatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
